items.title: 'They made him a defensive player' - Trump questions Kane role in semi
items.summary: US President Donald Trump joins criticism of England's tactics in their World Cup semi-final loss to Argentina, by questioning Harry Kane's second-half "defensive" role.

items.title: Defiant Tuchel defends decisions and says loss is 'scar we carry now'
items.summary: England head coach Thomas Tuchel defends his tactical decisions during the World Cup semi-final defeat by Argentina in a tense news conference.
